text.tspan: void blocked(int *src, int *dst, int N, int B)

ul.li: Effect: Each write triggers a new Cache Line fetch (RFO).
L1 Utilization: 1/16th (4 bytes used per 64-byte line).
Block Size (B): Tuned for L1/L2 cache size.
Spatial Locality: Both read and write become sequential within the block.
Cache Misses: Reduced from $O(N^2)$ to $O(N^2 / CacheLineSize)$.
